title: DetectEntryPointSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``detect-entry-point`` composite primitive (WS5 #4).

Collapses the six raw-shell probe block (``ls`` / ``find`` / ``grep`` /
``head`` over candidate files) that ``hpc-wrap-entry-point`` SKILL.md
duplicated verbatim across Step 0 (the greenfield branch) and Step 1
(the mature-repo branch) into one deterministic CLI call. The verb
scans the experiment directory for Python entry-point candidates
(conventional ``main.py`` / ``train.py`` / ``run.py`` / ``experiment.py``
at the root and under ``src/``, package ``__main__.py`` modules, declared
``[project.scripts]`` console scripts, and non-Python ``run.sh`` /
``launch.sh`` / binary entry points), classifies each Python candidate's
argv style, and locates files already carrying ``@register_run``.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Absolute path to the experiment / repo directory to scan.
